description: Reviewed safety-waiver residual (no net-new). Check heuristics for batch-operation-limits, unbounded-memory, and context-mutation were improved (suppression-check-improvements) so prior waivers were removed rather than re-budgeted. Cosmetic slugs are report-only. module-coupling-fan-out floor (4): documented composition roots (graph/simulation tool wiring, dashboard bundle entry, graph CLI orchestrators) — not accidental god-files.
